channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Former Trump Lawyer Criticizes Trump's IRS Lawsuit and $1.7 Billion Fund Plan
item.description: Former President Donald Trump's legal strategies involving the IRS have drawn sharp criticism from his own former attorney, Ty Cobb. Trump had filed a $10 billion lawsuit against the IRS, which he ove...

item.title: Dutch Citizen Missing in Mombasa, Family Seeks Help in Kenya
item.description: A Dutch citizen named Sheikh Mahfuzur Rahman Emon, originally from Bangladesh, has gone missing while on holiday in Kenya. Emon arrived in Mombasa on 11th April 2026 and was sharing updates from his t...

item.title: Kirinyaga Woman Murdered in Nairobi After Troubled Relationship
item.description: Nairobi – Ann Keya, a woman originally from Kirinyaga, was allegedly murdered by her boyfriend in Kilimani on May 14, shortly after returning to work following her resignation. Her mother, Julia Wanji...

item.title: Amazon Ends Support for Older Kindles; Users Explore Alternatives
item.description: As of May 16, 2026, Amazon has officially ended support for all first- and second-generation Kindle devices, including Kindle Fire tablets, the Kindle Touch, and the 9.7-inch Kindle DX, along with any...

item.title: Kaduna APC Chairman Abducted by Youths After Controversial House of Reps Primary
item.description: For Igabi Local Government Area, Kaduna State, wahala burst Saturday as angry youths carry the APC chairman, Bashir Jibrin Jaji, following disagreement over the House of Representatives primary for Ig...

item.title: Key Developments in the Legal Dispute Between Elon Musk and Sam Altman Over OpenAI
item.description: A federal trial in Oakland, California, has brought to light the bitter legal feud between Elon Musk and Sam Altman regarding OpenAI. Musk has accused Altman, OpenAI, and its president, Greg Brockman,...

item.title: Dog in Valenzuela Seeks Relief from Extreme Heat Inside Household Fridge
item.description: In Valenzuela, Metro Manila, residents were surprised to find a dog seeking refuge inside a household refrigerator as temperatures soared. The incident highlights the extreme heat conditions affecting...

item.title: Julia Letlow and John Fleming Advance to Louisiana Republican Senate Runoff Against Incumbent Bill Cassidy
item.description: In the Louisiana Republican Senate primary, U.S. Representative Julia Letlow and State Treasurer John Fleming advanced to a runoff, unseating incumbent Senator Bill Cassidy from an outright victory. L...

item.title: Pakistan Engages in Diplomatic Efforts to Revive US-Iran Negotiations
item.description: ISLAMABAD — Pakistan has stepped up its diplomatic role in the ongoing US-Iran tensions, with Interior Minister Mohsin Naqvi visiting Tehran on a previously unannounced two-day trip. Officially, the v...

item.title: Pastor Ng'ang'a and Wife Share Romantic Moments During US Mission
item.description: Pastor James Maina Ng'ang'a, known popularly as Pastor Ng'ang'a, and his wife Murugi Maina recently warmed fans’ hearts after sharing a lovely photo from their evangelical trip to Seattle, USA. Murugi...

item.title: South Africa must prioritise building AI capability before expanding governance
item.description: South Africa's draft national AI policy recently collapsed after it was found to contain AI-generated fake academic references, turning what should have been a milestone in digital governance into a c...

item.title: Pakistan-India Relations: The Case for Legal Diplomacy and Law-Enforcement Cooperation
item.description: The article discusses the concept of 'legal diplomacy' as a way to improve Pakistan-India relations, especially in the context of terrorism and border disputes. It recounts a 2016 initiative by the Re...

item.title: Mike Ashley Admits to Using Covert Surveillance Against JD Sports Rival
item.description: In a rare and candid interview, Mike Ashley, founder of Sports Direct, has confirmed that he orchestrated covert surveillance that ultimately contributed to the downfall of his long-time business riva...

item.title: Bulgaria achieves first Eurovision victory as Dara triumphs with Bangaranga
item.description: Bulgaria has secured its first-ever Eurovision victory at the 70th edition of the contest, held in Vienna, with singer Dara performing the song Bangaranga. The 27-year-old described the track as “pop ...

item.title: ArXiv Implements One-Year Ban for Authors Who Misuse AI in Research Papers
item.description: ArXiv, a prominent preprint repository widely used in computer science and mathematics, is strengthening its policies against the misuse of large language models (LLMs) in scientific papers. While arX...

item.title: Peter Obi Condoles Families of Security Personnel Killed in Yobe Attack
item.description: For Yobe State, another wahala don happen as terrorist attack hit military training school for Buni Yadi, wey don lead to death of at least 17 police officers plus some soldiers. Families of the falle...

item.title: Remembering Susannah York: Icon of British Cinema in the 1960s and 1970s
item.description: Susannah York, known for her striking blue eyes and ethereal blonde beauty, was much more than a classic 'English Rose.' Emerging in the 1960s, she became a defining figure of the British New Wave, de...

item.title: Delhi Court Grants Pre-Arrest Bail to Robert Vadra in Haryana Land Transaction Case
item.description: A Delhi court on Saturday granted pre-arrest bail to businessman Robert Vadra in a money laundering case linked to a land deal in Haryana. The court observed that there was no need for Vadra's judicia...

item.title: Delta Goodrem achieves fourth place for Australia at Eurovision 2026 as Bulgaria wins
item.description: Australian singer Delta Goodrem delivered a powerful and emotionally charged performance of her ballad 'Eclipse' at the Eurovision Song Contest 2026 grand final in Vienna, earning widespread acclaim f...

item.title: Father-of-two fatally trapped in escalator while commuters fail to intervene
item.description: A tragic incident occurred at Davis Station in Somerville, Boston, where 40-year-old father Steven McCluskey lost his life after becoming trapped in an escalator. The accident took place just before 5...
